features.description: claude mcp list/get no longer spawn .mcp.json servers self-approved by committed .claude/settings.json; pending approval
features.reference_changelog_line: Security: `claude mcp list`/`get` no longer spawn `.mcp.json` servers that a repo self-approved via a committed `.claude/settings.json`; untrusted workspaces show `⏸ Pending approval`

features.description: claude agents --dangerously-skip-permissions now correctly applies bypass mode to spawned agents instead of silent auto-
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `claude agents --dangerously-skip-permissions` silently falling back to auto mode instead of showing the bypass disclaimer and applying bypass mode to spawned agents

features.description: Background sessions now survive process stop/restart/update on all platforms including Windows handoff of background she
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved background session reliability: long-running commands and workflows now survive the session's process being stopped, restarted, or updated — including on Windows, where background shells are handed off instead of being killed

features.description: Background agent workers killed by daemon restart now auto-resume from last checkpoint when agents view next opens.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved background agents: workers killed by a daemon restart are now automatically resumed from where they left off the next time the agents view opens

features.description: Remote Control disabled when ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL targets a non-Anthropic host, matching Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry behavior.
features.reference_changelog_line: Remote Control is now disabled when `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` points at a non-Anthropic host, matching the existing behavior under `CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK`/`_VERTEX`/`_FOUNDRY`

features.description: Org/role default model set in admin console surfaces in /model as 'Org default' or 'Role default' when user has no pick.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added support for organization default models — admins set it in the org console; it shows as "Org default" (or "Role default") in `/model` when you haven't picked one yourself

features.description: Streaming idle watchdog enabled by default for all providers; CLAUDE_ENABLE_STREAM_WATCHDOG=0 disables the 5-minute abor
features.reference_changelog_line: The streaming idle watchdog is now on by default for all providers — it aborts and retries when a response stream produces no events for 5 minutes. Set `CLAUDE_ENABLE_STREAM_WATCHDOG=0` to disable.
